response.justification: The candidate has the right career length (~17 years) and genuine polyglot, full-stack depth, but the role demands director-level strategic leadership and recognized AI expertise neither of which is demonstrated. AI involvement is limited to the current role (MCP tooling, agentic workflow support) with no prior track record of building AI products, publishing in the field, or advising customers on AI adoption at scale. The seniority profile is Staff engineer, not principal IC operating at the director level the role requires.
strengths: Long, continuous engineering career across web, embedded, infrastructure, and mobile — meets the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial streak evidenced by founding GISCollective, building open-source libraries, and multiple conference talks
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling shows a relevant pivot
concerns: AI depth is thin and very recent — no ML/AI products built, no research output, no recognized standing in the field before 2025
No evidence of director-level leadership: no team ownership, no strategic customer advisory, no cross-org influence at scale
Education stops at a BS in Computer Science with no advanced degree in an AI-adjacent field

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC requirement
